channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Who flies the American flag for holidays — and who never flies one, according to an AP-NORC poll
item.description: Jerry Esters proudly displays the American flag each day on his Detroit home. A few miles away, Yvonne Pistochini says there is no scenario under which she would allow the Stars and Stripes to cast its shadow where she lives.

item.title: 3 firefighters killed in Western wildfire were trying to shield themselves from flames
Sweltering Midwest heat cancels outdoor plans as cooling centers open and the East braces
